title: Industrial Testing and Metrology
entry_mechanism: NIDLP-KAEC automotive cluster development with international partner
executive_summary:
Automotive component quality control requires precision dimensional measurement, material testing, and functional validation. Node AU-8 targets Saudi accredited metrology and testing services for the automotive cluster — IATF 16949-compliant dimensional inspection, material characterisation, and functional test capabilities that serve all KAEC automotive manufacturers as a shared service.

The global automotive industrial testing and metrology market is growing in line with the overall automotive industry. Saudi Arabia's Vision 2030 automotive programme creates immediate domestic demand anchored by Saudi OEM assembly and the 10M+ vehicle installed base.
